personalInfo.name: MIKITA KAVALIOU
personalInfo.title: Senior Front End Engineer | React & Next.js
personalInfo.professionalObjective: Product-focused Front-End Engineer specializing in React 19, Next.js 15, and TypeScript. Expert in building high-performance, accessible interfaces (90+ Lighthouse) and integrating complex browser APIs (Web Audio, WebRTC) for native-quality web experiences.
personalInfo.status: Based in Grenoble, France. Free access to the EU job market.

experience.title: Front End Web Developer
responsibilities: Enterprise UI Development: Built and deployed production-ready web applications from scratch using Next.js and React, while developing new interactive features for existing enterprise dashboards.
System Migration: Spearheaded the migration of legacy views into modular, reusable Next.js components, establishing a scalable and accessible frontend architecture.
State & Performance: Implemented strict state management (Zustand) and caching strategies, significantly reducing client-side rendering bottlenecks in large-scale applications.
Conversion Optimization: Collaborated directly with UX/UI designers to implement responsive design patterns, increasing mobile usability and engagement metrics.
Managed cloud deployments on Vercel and AWS, configuring CI/CD pipelines for zero-downtime releases across staging and production environments.
Implemented a comprehensive E2E test suite (Playwright) covering 80% of critical user paths, reducing production regressions by 35%.

experience.title: Lead Front-End Developer — Lexity
responsibilities: Built Lexity MVP from scratch using Next.js 15 and TypeScript, achieving 90+ Lighthouse performance scores with responsive, accessible UI.
Implemented real-time contextual feedback interfaces via TanStack Query and Zustand, delivering smooth optimistic UI updates.

experience.title: Lead Front-End Developer — Interly
responsibilities: Built Interly MVP from scratch, integrating Web MediaRecorder API for real-time voice processing with custom interactive DOM transformations.
Authored comprehensive E2E test suites using Playwright with custom auth-bypass mechanisms to streamline CI/CD pipelines.
Engineered optimistic UI updates and complex interactive data visualizations using Chart.js and Framer Motion.

experience.title: Junior Front End Web Developer
responsibilities: Developed responsive web application components in Agile teams using React and modern JavaScript, collaborating on feature implementation and code reviews.
Implemented cross-browser compatible layouts and performed debugging across multiple platforms, ensuring consistent user experiences.

projects.name: Lexity MVP
projects.description: Full-stack MVP of an AI language learning platform built from scratch — Next.js 15 frontend with interactive UI, real-time feedback, and responsive design achieving 90+ Lighthouse scores.
projects.stack: Next.js 15, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Zustand, TanStack Query, Prisma

projects.name: Interly MVP
projects.description: AI voice coaching MVP with Web Audio API integration for real-time audio processing, custom interactive UI components, and comprehensive E2E testing with Playwright.
projects.stack: Next.js 15, TypeScript, Web Audio API, Tailwind CSS, Playwright, Framer Motion

education.degree: Engineering Degree in Radio-Electronics — Master's Equivalent (Bac+4)
education.institution: Minsk State Higher College of Radiotechnics
